nl_query: How many board coordinators have a custom honorarium weight?
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bc.id) AS custom_honorarium_weight_count
FROM   board_coordinator bc
JOIN   faculty_cache     fc ON fc.employee_erp_id = bc.employee_id
WHERE  bc.honorarium_weight != (SELECT honorarium_rate_card.board_coordinator_weight
                                 FROM   honorarium_rate_card
                                 WHERE  is_active = TRUE)
